pages.text: Thabo pretends that his bed is a raft on the sea!

blocks.text: Thabo pretends that his bed is a raft on the sea!

pages.text: His little sister Keitu says, “Yes! And also! There are sharks.” “No!” says Thabo.

“No!” says Thabo.

pages.text: Thabo pretends that their taxi is a spaceship!

blocks.text: Thabo pretends that their taxi is a spaceship!

pages.text: His little sister Keitu says, “Yes! And also! Watch out for shooting stars !” “No,” says Thabo.

pages.text: Thabo pretends the playground is a jungle !

pages.text: “No,” says Thabo. His little sister Keitu says, “Yes! And also! We are lions .”

His little sister Keitu says, “Yes! And also! We are lions .”

pages.text: “Oh!” says Thabo, “Wait! Wow! Yes! That’s a great idea!” “I know!” says Keitu.

pages.text: Thabo pretends to be a lion! Keitu also pretends to be a lion!

Keitu also pretends to be a lion!

pages.text: Thabo pretends the other kids are a river of crocodiles! Keitu says, “Yes! And also! We can jump on this log to float away.”

pages.text: Story spread 10 “Yes! And also!” Thabo says, “We can slide down the rainbow!” Keitu says, “Yes! And also! Watch out for the dinosaurs!”

“Yes! And also!” Thabo says, “We can slide down the rainbow!”
Keitu says, “Yes! And also! Watch out for the dinosaurs!”

pages.text: Thabo says,“I had the best day playing pretend with you.” Keitu says, “And also! We should play again tomorrow!”
